allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "--- Program Files node ---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "--- nvm ---"; Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "--- winget ---"; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "--- fnm ---"; \(Get-Command fnm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Filip\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Logistiko"; npm run dev 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "C:\\Users\\Filip\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-Filip-OneDrive-Desktop-Logistiko\\fad7cfec-9d66-4e13-bd79-2538d4b4edd7\\scratchpad\\dev.log" -Encoding utf8)

PowerShell($deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); $ready=$false; while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){$ready=$true; break} } catch {} Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500 }; if\($ready\){ Write-Output "READY 200" } else { Write-Output "NOT READY" }; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Filip\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-Filip-OneDrive-Desktop-Logistiko\\fad7cfec-9d66-4e13-bd79-2538d4b4edd7\\scratchpad\\dev.log" -Tail 20 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
